DatasetTitle: PASSPORTS HELD (CLASSIFICATION 2) BY AGE BY SEX
Annotations: 1. 'EU' is the European Union and is as defined on Census day (27 March 2011).; 2. 'EEA' is the European Economic Area and is as defined on Census day (27 March 2011).; 3. ‘Other’ includes British Overseas Territories.; 4. 'Age' is age at last birthday.
